LanguageData.Ammo_75x714mmRShell_AP.label: 75x714mmR shell (AP)
LanguageData.Ammo_75x714mmRShell_AP.description: A relatively powerful, high-velocity shell designed to destroy heavily armored targets.
LanguageData.Ammo_75x714mmRShell_HE.label: 75x714mmR shell (HE)
LanguageData.Ammo_75x714mmRShell_HE.description: A relatively powerful, high-velocity shell designed to destroy heavily armored targets.
LanguageData.Bullet_75x714mmRShell_AP.label: 75x714mmR shell (AP)
LanguageData.Bullet_75x714mmRShell_HE.label: 75x714mmR shell (HE)
